title: 目標達成の後に・だって、ウマドル

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Smart Falcon is performing well in her races. As
her popularity increases, so does the number of
people who come to see her street performances.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She comes to me with a shocking request, saying
she wants to take on the Satsuki Sho for her next
race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Not only is she ill-suited for running on turf, the
Classic Triple Crown draws in the very best racers
of each generation. Winning will be no easy feat.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
All the same, Smart Falcon insists on entering.
She wants her fans to hear her sing a song that
can only be sung on the Classic Triple Crown tour.
